title: Someone at the Window
content: Emily was reading a book when she heard a gentle tap on the window. She looked outside but saw only darkness. A few moments later, another tap made her jump. Carefully, she pulled back the curtain. Sitting on the windowsill was a small bird pecking at the glass. It seemed to be looking at its own reflection. Emily smiled and quietly opened the window. The bird flew away into the night. What first seemed frightening became a simple and peaceful moment.
